paragraphs: I started headlessengineer because I noticed a gap: most businesses either get junior developers who learn on the job, or large consultancies that overengineer everything. There is a third option — a senior engineer who has built things at scale, understands business trade-offs, and will actually write the code.

Across 12 years I have architected distributed commerce platforms, led cross-continent engineering teams, and brought agentic AI from proof-of-concept into production. The common thread is translating real business problems into working software — whatever stack that takes.
about.callout: The right technology for the problem. No dogma, no hype.

metrics.label: Countries served by a single platform build
Deployment time reduction on an enterprise OMS
POCs taken to production in the last 18 months

philosophy: Lead with the outcome, not the stack.
Complexity is a cost — justify it or cut it.
The best architecture is the one the team can maintain.

work.name: Distributed Order Management
work.context: Multi-country OMS coordinating fulfilment across regional markets
work.outcome: 65% reduction in deployment time through pipeline automation and IaC

work.name: Headless B2C Commerce Platform
work.context: Greenfield storefront covering 26 countries and 13 languages
work.outcome: Multi-PSP payments, location-based routing, Redis-backed performance

work.name: AI Documentation Pipeline
work.context: Generates and updates technical docs from code changes automatically
work.outcome: Taken from POC to live production client engagement

work.name: Semantic Search POC
work.context: Vector search over product catalogue for a Spryker storefront
work.outcome: Prototype shipped; improved search relevance measurably

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer — Technology Architect
bullets: Architected enterprise eCommerce platforms across B2B, B2C, and D2C for clients in automotive, FMCG, and sportswear.
Led a multi-country OMS rollout achieving 65% reduction in deployment time through IaC and pipeline automation.
Pioneered AI-enhanced development — agentic tooling and automation pipelines improving throughput and documentation quality.
Led cross-functional teams of 9–15 engineers, owning technical direction, architecture governance, and delivery quality.

experience.title: Software Engineer II
bullets: Delivered a full greenfield B2C platform across 26 countries and 13 languages on Spryker.
Migrated a monolith to GoLang microservices using the Strangler Fig pattern.
Contributed to headless commerce with Next.js and TypeScript ahead of industry MACH adoption.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Designed and delivered Magento solutions across B2B and B2C — greenfield builds, migrations, multi-store setups.
Primary technical point of contact, translating business requirements into specifications.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Delivered Magento eCommerce solutions with full-cycle ownership from theme to module to client communication.
